mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_disposal_company ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT * FROM tb_disposal_company WHERE company_name LIKE '%' + #{companyName} + '%' ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_disposal_company WHERE company_name LIKE '%' + #{companyName} + '%'
SELECT * FROM tb_disposal_company WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY company_name ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_disposal_company (company_name, company_code, business_number, ceo_name, phone, address, waste_types, license_number, license_expiry, rating, status, reg_user, created_at, modified_at) VALUES (#{companyName}, #{companyCode}, #{businessNumber}, #{ceoName}, #{phone}, #{address}, #{wasteTypes}, #{licenseNumber}, #{licenseExpiry}, #{rating}, #{status}, #{regUser}, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_disposal_company SET company_name = #{companyName}, company_code = #{companyCode}, business_number = #{businessNumber}, ceo_name = #{ceoName}, phone = #{phone}, address = #{address}, waste_types = #{wasteTypes}, license_number = #{licenseNumber}, license_expiry = #{licenseExpiry}, rating = #{rating}, status = #{status}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
